personality: 1 iOS-Native Clean infused with 6 Glass/Luxe over Map
personality_one_liner: A frictionless, premium micro-mobility experience where the map takes center stage and UI floats elegantly with glassmorphism.

spacing.rule: Generous map spacing. Floating pills must have md/lg padding inside and xl margin from screen edges. Bottom sheets use xl inner padding.

do's: Floating pills over the map ('Where to?', avatar).
Floating CTA ('Scan QR') hovering over the map.
Modal scrims and bottom sheet drag-handle zones.

screens.name: Login
screens.purpose: Frictionless Phone + OTP auth and KYC prompt.

states.error: Standard toast/inline error for wrong OTP.

screens.layout: Clean full-bleed layout. Large wordmark. Phone input with +91 prefix. Smooth transition to 6-digit OTP (mock 123456). PENDING_KYC banner floating at top/bottom once authenticated.

screens.name: Main Map Screen
screens.purpose: Full-screen exploration of available EVs and Hubs.

states.empty: No EVs nearby message inside bottom sheet.

screens.layout: Full-screen map. Top: Floating glass pill 'Where to?' + Profile Avatar. Bottom: Persistent bottom sheet at 15% showing 'Nearest Hub', and a floating 'Scan QR' FAB right above the sheet.

screens.name: Vehicle Details
screens.purpose: Detailed view of the selected Ather 450X to confirm reservation.
screens.layout: Expands bottom sheet to 40-50%. Shows EV image/Model, Battery %, Range (km), and Pricing. Sticky 'Reserve Vehicle' button at the bottom.

screens.name: Active Rental
screens.layout: Live map mode. Bottom sheet locked open displaying Duration Timer, Cost (ticking up), and remaining Battery. Includes a 'Swipe to End Rental' slider.

screens.name: Sidebar/Profile
screens.layout: Standard screen. Top section: User details + Wallet Balance card. List below: Ride History, Help & Support. Minimalist list rows with chevrons.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow standard Uber/Lime UX: The map is the hero. Use MapView from react-native-maps. Render UI components as floating overlays (absolute position) or within the Bottom Sheet.
Implement the 'Scan QR' button as a prominent FAB layered *over* the map, anchored right above the bottom sheet.
Ensure dark mode support correctly inverts the surface colors, but keep the brand Primary (Neon Green #1ED760) extremely vibrant in both modes.
Use @gorhom/bottom-sheet for all detail and active rental interactions instead of pushing to new screens.
For Active Rental, implement a 'Swipe to End' slider mechanism to prevent accidental cancellation.
Implement haptics directly on primary actions like Reserve, QR Scan, and Swipe to End.
Ensure the sticky CTA in bottom sheets accounts for safe area.
